visual_description: The video opens on an extremely dark, almost black screen. In the upper right corner, a faint, blurry, light-colored shape is barely visible. The camera is static, holding a steady shot of the indistinct, shadowy environment. The audio opens with a deep, resonant, and ominous hum that creates a sense of immense scale and foreboding. The scene cuts to a high-angle, top-down view of a man standing in a narrow, dark space. He is dressed in a formal, old-fashioned black suit with a white shirt and a cravat. He holds a thin, dark object, possibly a cane or a whip, in his right hand. He looks up towards the camera with a determined or concerned expression. The space he is in is flanked on both sides by towering, shadowy figures that resemble statues or large, armored figures, creating a claustrophobic and intimidating atmosphere. The lighting is dim, casting deep shadows and highlighting the man as the central focus. The camera remains in a static, high-angle position. This is quickly joined by a powerful, percussive, and dramatic orchestral score, dominated by booming percussion and low, sustained string notes.
